{{CargoRelic
|name=Norethindrone
|class_id=21252
|rank=AAA
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=This is a synthetic progestin drug that inhibits ovulation and affects the uterine lining environment, thereby achieving contraceptive effects. The successful synthesis ofThis substance by Jerasi's research team marked the birth of the world's first steroid contraceptive, whose development and application had a broad and profound impact on human society, not only changing women's lifestyles but also advancing medicine and sociology.
|fame=73
|art=37
|fth=38
|civ=45
|tech=50
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
